summary: End-to-end category & subcategory drilldown verified. Backend reseed (Abrasives/Saw Blades/Power Tools Accessories) returns 3 categories with the correct sub-slugs; product filters return 6/4/1/2 as specified. ProductsPage drilldown (no-filter -> category pick -> subcategory pick) updates URL, breadcrumb, title, category-strip visibility, subcategory-strip chips and product counts correctly. Sidebar tree (filter-category-* / filter-subcat-*) and Clear All button reset filters. HomePage category cards navigate to /products?category=<slug>. Admin Products form has dynamic category/subcategory chaining. Admin add-then-delete category roundtrip propagates to /products (new pick + chip) and cleanup verified.
action_items: (Carry-over from iter 3) _slugify in /app/backend/server.py still strips underscores instead of converting to hyphen.

(Carry-over from iter 3) DELETE /api/categories/{id} does not cascade/guard against products still referencing that slug; orphan products remain. Worth either preventing delete-when-in-use or null-ing the category field.
(Carry-over from iter 3) POST /api/categories/{id}/subcategories does not dedupe by sub_slug.
(Carry-over from iter 3) PUT /api/categories/{id} raises 500 on non-ObjectId id (missing try/except around ObjectId(...)).
(Carry-over from iter 2) server.py is ~1150 lines — recommend splitting into modules; CORS allow_origins includes '*' alongside allow_credentials=True.
critical_code_review_comments: ProductsPage.js (540 lines) is reasonable but renders both desktop sidebar tree AND mobile flyout filter — consider extracting the FilterTree component to its own file to keep ProductsPage thin.
HomePage.js (474 lines): category card's hover state has the orange underline scale animation only on the top edge — fine, just noting consistency with the section style.

ProductsPage breadcrumb concatenates segments without separator spans rendering arrows in the test text-content view ('All ProductsAbrasivesCut Off Wheels'), but visually arrows are present via SVG icons; consider adding aria-hidden separators with text-content fallback for screen readers.

AdminProducts subcategory dropdown does NOT clear the previously chosen subcategory when category is switched in the existing form state — verified the dropdown re-renders but if a stale 'tct' value is in form state when user switches to abrasives, ensure setSubcategory('') is also fired on category change. (Could not directly reproduce in test because both switches happened on a fresh form.)
Categories endpoint /api/categories returns subcategories as embedded array; consider returning an `id` per subcategory to allow stable React keys and future per-sub mutations.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (ProductsPage drilldown + sidebar + clear + breadcrumb + title + count, HomePage category card nav, Admin Products dynamic dropdowns, Admin Categories add->verify on /products->delete roundtrip all verified, no console errors)

seed_data_creation: Backend tests create + delete one transient category per run (slug 'testcat-<epoch>'). UI test creates+deletes 'test-cat-drilldown'. No leftover test data after this run (verified visually: only 3 seeded categories remain after delete).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reseed hierarchy: 3 categories (abrasives, saw-blades, power-tools-accessories). Abrasives subs: cut-off-wheels, grinding-wheels, flap-discs, non-woven-wheels, buffing-polishing. Saw-blades subs: tct, diamond, marble-granite. Power-tools-accessories subs: drill-bits, wire-brushes. 6 sample products: 4 under abrasives (cut-off-wheels x1, grinding-wheels x1, flap-discs x1, non-woven-wheels x1), 2 under saw-blades (tct, diamond), 0 under power-tools-accessories. ProductsPage data-testids: products-page, products-breadcrumb, category-strip, pick-category-{slug}, subcategory-strip, subcategory-chip-all, subcategory-chip-{slug}, filter-category-all, filter-category-{slug}, filter-subcat-{cat}-all, filter-subcat-{cat}-{slug}, clear-filters-btn, product-card-{id}, products-count, no-products, mobile-filter-btn, product-search-input. Title text content is mixed-case ('Abrasives', 'Cut Off Wheels') but CSS uppercases visually. Breadcrumb concatenates segment text in DOM text-content because arrow separators are SVG icons.
tested_features: GET /api/categories returns 3 categories (abrasives, saw-blades, power-tools-accessories) with full subcategory arrays
GET /api/products?category=abrasives returns 4 products all with category=abrasives
GET /api/products?category=abrasives&subcategory=cut-off-wheels returns 1 product (Mayur Pro Cut Off Wheel 4")
Admin CRUD on categories (POST + DELETE subcategory + DELETE category) still works with auth
ProductsPage at /products shows Product Catalog title, All Products breadcrumb, category-strip with 3 cards, 6 products, 3 NEW badges
Click pick-category-abrasives -> URL=/products?category=abrasives, title=Abrasives, breadcrumb=All Products>Abrasives, category-strip hidden, subcategory-strip with 6 chips (all + 5 subs), 4 products
Click subcategory-chip-cut-off-wheels -> URL adds &subcategory=cut-off-wheels, title=Cut Off Wheels, breadcrumb=All Products>Abrasives>Cut Off Wheels, 1 product
Sidebar tree: filter-category-all resets to /products with 6 products; filter-subcat-abrasives-grinding-wheels filters to 1 product and updates URL
HomePage category cards have href=/products?category={slug} for all 3; clicking Abrasives navigates and applies filter (4 products + subcategory-strip visible)

Admin Products Add modal: product-category-select populated with 3 dynamic slugs; selecting abrasives populates subcategory-select with 5 subs; switching to saw-blades repopulates with tct/diamond/marble-granite

Admin Categories: Add 'Test Cat Drilldown' with sub 'Test Sub' -> card visible -> /products shows pick-category-test-cat-drilldown -> clicking shows subcategory-chip-test-sub -> Delete removes card and product strip pick
